reviews.comment:
En más de 20 años que me abastezco de combustible en este lugar nunca he tenido más que palabras elogiosas, pero algo debe haber cambiado en la concesión del Full, que ya no atiende como antes, y de hecho permanece cerrado en lo s horarios comerciales

(Translated by Google)
In the more than 20 years I've been getting my fuel at this station, I've always had nothing but praise for it, but something must have changed at the Full dealership, because it doesn't serve customers like it used to, and in fact, it's closed during business hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyX09tRGx3RRAB
